settings.office_address: Mezzanine Floor Office No - 1, 7653 Al-Madinah Al-Munawarah Rd, Al-Baghdadiyah Al-Sharqiyah District - 4672, Jeddah 22235

services.title: MEP Contracting
services.description: Engineering, procurement, and construction of complete MEP systems for major infrastructure projects across Saudi Arabia and the GCC region.

services.title: ELV Systems
services.description: Complete Extra Low Voltage system solutions for smart and intelligent buildings, providing security, communication, and operational efficiency.

services.title: Automation Systems
services.description: State-of-the-art automated entrance and loading systems for commercial, industrial, and logistics facilities.

services.title: Facility Management
services.description: Comprehensive facility management services to keep buildings running at peak efficiency while reducing downtime and operating costs.

services.title: Workforce Solutions
services.description: Skilled manpower and HR support tailored to the construction and engineering sector across the GCC.

services.title: Trading
services.description: Authorized supply of premium HVAC materials, MEP equipment, and engineering products from leading global manufacturers.

jobs.title: MEP Project Engineer
jobs.description: Lead electrical and mechanical delivery for high-rise and infrastructure projects.

jobs.title: ELV Systems Specialist
jobs.description: Design and deploy BMS, CCTV, access control, and fire alarm systems.

jobs.title: Facility Management Coordinator
jobs.description: Manage FM operations and client service delivery for enterprise portfolios.

jobs.title: Site Safety Officer
jobs.description: Ensure compliance with safety standards and drive safe execution on site.

projects.title: International Airports
projects.description: Large-scale passenger environments with MEP and ELV coordination at infrastructure scale.

projects.title: Sports Stadiums
projects.description: High-performance venues requiring resilient systems and demanding delivery timelines.

projects.title: Luxury Hotels
projects.description: Hospitality builds where guest experience depends on invisible technical precision.

projects.title: Railways and Metro
projects.description: Transit environments that need reliability, safety, and systems integration at every layer.

projects.title: Hospitals and Healthcare
projects.description: Critical healthcare facilities requiring precision engineering and dependable maintenance planning.

projects.title: Commercial Towers
projects.description: Mixed-use and commercial assets delivered with integrated engineering systems.

certificates.title: ISO 9001:2015
certificates.subtitle: Quality Management System
certificates.description: Certified for maintaining a robust Quality Management System that ensures consistent delivery.

certificates.title: ISO 45001:2018
certificates.subtitle: Occupational Health and Safety
certificates.description: Certified for implementing a strong Occupational Health and Safety Management System.

certificates.title: Approved Contractor
certificates.subtitle: FIFA World Cup Delivery Legacy
certificates.description: Approved contractor recognition for high-profile project delivery standards.

certificates.title: Labour Camp Excellence
certificates.subtitle: Award Winning Facility Standards
certificates.description: Recognition for outstanding workforce accommodation and support facilities.

testimonials.title: Reliable Partner
testimonials.description: Qatar Masters has been a reliable partner on multiple major projects. Their quality of work and professionalism is consistently outstanding.

testimonials.title: Skilled MEP Team
testimonials.description: Their MEP team is highly skilled and well-organized. They completed the electrical works on our flagship project ahead of schedule.

testimonials.title: Committed to Quality
testimonials.description: We have been awarding contracts to Qatar Masters for years. Their commitment to quality and safety standards is unmatched.
